results.title: Rivals Star Luca Pasqualino Claims He's Still 'Haunted' By His Ted Lasso Audition
results.description: Luca Pasqualino in Rivals Rivals actor Luca Pasqualino has revealed he came close to landing a major role in a very different British show that has also gone on to become a huge hit internationally. The former Skins actor can currently be seen in action as Bas Baddington in Rivals, which returned for its long-awaited second season earlier this month . During a recent interview with HuffPost UK to promote the new episodes of the Jilly Cooper bonkbuster, Luca was asked if there was an audition he missed out on earlier on in his career that still “haunts” him today, to which he admitted that there was “definitely” one that came immediately to mind for him. “One that I got really, really close to that sort of sticks out was Ted Lasso,” he explained, before sharing that he’d tried out to play striker Jamie Tartt in the Apple TV+ series . “I got down to [the last few], went and met Jason Sudeikis, had two tests for it, and I was so close. But my friend Phil Dunster, he got the part in the end. And he was so good.” View this post on Instagram Luca continued: “If you watch [something that you’ve auditioned for] and the person who gets it is really awful or whatever, it makes you feel worse. “But [Phil] was so good, it’s like, ‘OK, fine, I get it. This is going to be an easier pill to swallow’.” Phil Dunster in Ted Lasso's third season The current season of Rivals has been even more popular among critics and viewers than its predecessor, with some exciting new additions joining the cast alongside regular faces like Alex Hassell , David Tennant , Aidan Turner and Danny Dyer this time around. New episodes are currently airing weekly on Disney+, although the show is due to take a mid-season break after the sixth instalment premieres at the end of next week. results.title: Dr Congo adapts burials amid Ebola outbreak
results.description: In the Democratic Republic of the Congo, the issue of burials is central to the management of the new Ebola outbreak affecting the country. Since bodies remain contagious even after death, burials must be carried out by specialized teams to limit the risk of infection. But securing public acceptance for these measures is a challenge as misinformation and mistrust of officials is rife in some communities.

results.title: Rs 150 for a dosa? Bengaluru hoteliers warn of 60% price shock over minimum wage hike
results.description: Under the new wage revision system, Karnataka has been divided into three zones, with workers being classified under four categories—highly skilled, skilled, semi-skilled and unskilled.

results.title: Cara365 sắp ra mắt: “Tân binh” căn hộ biển all-in-one chuẩn lifestyle mới xuất hiện tại Cam Ranh
results.description: Khi thị trường bất động sản nghỉ dưỡng đang tìm kiếm những sản phẩm khác biệt để kích hoạt sức mua, Cam Ranh chuẩn bị đón thêm một nhân tố mới: Cara365-tổ hợp căn hộ biển all-in-one thế hệ mới, được kỳ vọng mang đến làn gió trẻ trung, giàu trải nghiệm hơn cho thị trường. Việt Nam ghi nhận sự phát triển mạnh mẽ của phân khúc bất động sản hạng sang Legend Valley Country Club khai trương sân golf mới: Nâng tầm trải nghiệm golf đẳng cấp quốc tế tại Ninh Bình Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh mở không gian phát triển hướng biển
